title: peperomia berteroana subsp. berteroana
intro: Peperomia berteroana subsp. berteroana is a plant species that belongs to the Piperaceae family, characterized by its small, heart-shaped leaves and compact growth habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Peperomia berteroana subsp. berteroana include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
